refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital hallway. The rodent appears to be present at night.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in the hospital hallway while I was visiting my family member. The presence of rodents in a healthcare facility is unacceptable and raises serious concerns about cleanliness and patient safety. This incident occurred at night, which makes it even more disturbing.
voice_text: There's a rat in the hospital hallway, I saw it when I was visiting at night, it's really gross and scary.
